headline: Lululemon shares rise after shareholders approve board slate in settlement with founder
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ:LULU) shares rose more than 3% after shareholders approved three management-backed directors at the company’s June 25 annual general meeting, helping resolve a prolonged proxy dispute with founder Chip Wilson. The elected directors include former Levi Strauss...

headline: Lululemon Went From Darling Stock to Disaster. How to Fix It.
summary: It once was as hot as Amazon and Apple. Now it’s one of the 10 worst-performing stocks in the S&P 500.
